description:
Bifolio containing poetry in Hebrew, followed by a few lines in Judaeo-Arabic, followed by the same lines in Arabic script, concluding "this completes the qawl of al-Rāb Abū Isḥāq al-Andalusī with the help of God the exalted," followed by a ḥamdala and two other elaborate scrawls.

At bottom right there is an entry documenting that Sitt al-Dalāl //Amat al-Qādir// died on Monday night the 14th of Sivan, corresponding to Dhū l-Qaʿda.
